sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107687" key="u(permegeqe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερμεγεθ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n107687.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἑτερομεγ-</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:1:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
